Supports top5 and landscape modes. Run before customer-pain-mining or positioning-map.

plugins.name: customer-pain-mining

Combines Anysite MCP (Reddit, LinkedIn, YouTube comments, Twitter) with Exa MCP semantic search for review posts and comparison articles. Returns 3–5 pain clusters with verbatim quotes plus a white-space section of unmet feature requests.

plugins.name: positioning-map
plugins.description: Build a positioning map for 3–5 competitors and identify the empty quadrant a founder could own. Maps competitors across 5 signal axes (hero, pricing, specialities, recent shipping, hiring) using Anysite MCP (LinkedIn, SEC) and Exa MCP. Returns a comparison table, 3 candidate positioning moves with choice criteria, and a one-sentence positioning statement.

MEMORY.md auto-memory index is recognised but never rewritten. Forked from anthropics/claude-plugins-official claude-md-management (Isabella He, Anthropic).

plugins.name: session-debrief
plugins.description: Self-contained HTML debriefs of Claude Code session usage from ~/.claude/projects transcripts. Tokens, cache, subagents, skills, expensive prompts, cache-break clustering. Phase 1: clean rename + manifest. Phase 2 (tracked in AGENTS.md): cache-rot >300k flag, effort-level attribution from settings.json, marketplace-aware project tier mapping. Forked from anthropics/claude-plugins-official session-report.
